title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at CEAT Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!
